description: Composition Washed blue cotton jeans, has two side pockets with one pocket inside the side pocket, two patch pockets on the back with stitch detailing, zipper fly and button closure, and belt loops on the waist Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Take edgy rugged dressing to the next level in these blue jeans from spykar. Perfect for casual outings, this pair looks great with grunge tees, jackets and leather boots. Model statistics The product is of length 41.5" on a model of height 5'8" and waist 28"
